nodes.name: Webhook — Trigger from WF1
nodes.notes:
Dipanggil oleh Workflow 1 ketika intent = ASK_PRICE dan data lengkap.
Payload: { from, clientName, phoneNumberId, extracted: {building_type, tier, area_sqm, service_type} }

nodes.name: Sheets — Read RAB Konstruksi
nodes.notes:
Credentials: Google Sheets OAuth2 atau Service Account
Document ID sudah diisi dari spreadsheet Sudut Ruang.
Adjust headerRow sesuai baris header aktual di sheet.

nodes.name: Sheets — Log / Update Client
nodes.notes:
Sheet 'clients_database' harus dibuat dulu di spreadsheet.
Kolom: phone | name | last_intent | building_type | tier | area_sqm | rab_avg | fee_avg | status | last_contact | source

nodes.name: Notify Dashboard
nodes.notes: Ganti localhost:3000 dengan URL dashboard Anda di VPS.
